## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #<issue-number>

## Acceptance Criteria Mapping

- [ ] AC1: <paste acceptance criterion>
- [ ] AC2: <paste acceptance criterion>
- [ ] AC3: <paste acceptance criterion>

## TDD Evidence

- [ ] RED commit(s) present before GREEN commit(s)
- [ ] GREEN implementation is minimal and scoped to tests
- [ ] REFACTOR commit(s) keep all tests passing

## Gate 2 Checklist

> **This PR must remain a draft until ALL items below are checked.** Only the main conversation converts it from draft to ready-for-review, after Review Agent PASS + CI green.

- [ ] Issue has `status/review` label before merge approval
- [ ] Review agent summary attached in issue or PR comment
- [ ] Full test suite passes in CI
- [ ] Docs updated in `docs/` (or `README.md` when appropriate)
- [ ] Conventional Commits format satisfied

## Risk and Rollback

- [ ] Risk reviewed
- [ ] Rollback plan documented in issue
